item.name: Gilt Dermogenys
item.description:
A king among dermogenys, and lord of the waters of the lower Hungering Gardens.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Perhaps to prove those who doubted their aesthetic sensibilities wrong, this wavekin's creator sought to adjust its symbiotic microbes in pursuit of a specimen that would glitter like the sun that fell upon it. After much trial and error, the star was graced with dermogenys species new and old─the original haloed in silver, its younger cousin, gold.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The World Unsundered
